Become A Member

Art for all

Free Admission

Opportunities

Bringing new people to the Currier is part of our mission. Thanks to generous partners, we are able to offer the following donation-based admission opportunities. Find the starting point for your Currier journey.
Veterans &Active Duty Military *

​As a Blue Star Museum, the Currier is proud to offer free general admission to active duty military* and Veterans, as well as their families.

*Includes National Guard and reserves.

Thank you
for your service.
Institutional
Partners

Students, faculty, and staff at the following organizations enjoy free admission.

* With a valid institutional ID.

• NH Art Educators Association

• New England College

• Moore Center

• City Year

• Phillips Exeter Academy

• Southern New Hampshire University

• Saint Anselm College

Reciprocal
Member

Members of more than 1,000 museums and cultural organizations can visit the Currier for free because of our participation in the

If you are a member at a NARM, ROAM, or MARP-affiliated institution, simply show your membership card at guest services for free admission to the Currier.

Museums on Us ®

Free admission for

Bank of America cardholders

the first weekend of every month

​

​

Second Saturday

Free admission for New Hampshire residents the second Saturday of every month, plus free artmaking for all in the Creative Studio. Sponsored by:

Pamela Diamantis & Morey Goodman

Additional Partners

​​Interested in sponsoring a free access day? Share your organization or company’s commitment to the arts right here in our community by exploring high-value corporate sponsorship opportunities.

Become a corporate sponsor

Currier Museum of Art

150 Ash Street

Manchester, NH 03104

visitor@currier.org

603-669-6144

Open: WED – SUN

Hours: 10 AM – 5 PM EST

The Currier is proud to be a Blue Star Museum.

© 2025 Currier Museum of Art
